title: Peppery Crumbly Australian Horseradish Crumble
description: A show-off australian dish featuring horseradish with a peppery flavor profile and perfect for adding a unique twist to your meals.

ingredients.name: 250g cold butter
ingredients.notes: Cold butter helps with the crumbly texture

ingredients.name: 80ml milk or cream
ingredients.notes: To help bind ingredients together better

ingredients.name: Optional: A few drops of mustard oil or ghee for added flavor (tadka)

instructions: Gather all ingredients and place them within easy reach.
In a mixing bowl, combine flour and butter. Use a fork or pastry blender to cut in the cold butter until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Add grated horseradish and salt/pepper. Mix well; taste for seasoning if needed.
If you have mustard oil/ghee ready, add few drops now as this will create an instant 'tadka' effect which is a distinctive feature of the dish.
Gradually pour in milk or cream while mixing to achieve desired consistency - it should be moist but not too wet.
Transfer mixture into a greased pie tin (or any suitable baking dish).
Bake for 20-25 minutes until golden brown and crisp on top. Let cool before serving.
Serve warm with your favorite fruits or dessert as desired.
